headline: How The Cognizant (CTSH) Investment Story Is Shifting With GenAI And Mixed Street Views
summary: Cognizant Technology Solutions has seen its modeled fair value price target trimmed slightly to US$88.99 from US$90.20, a reduction of about 1.3%. This modest reset sits against a backdrop of mixed analyst commentary, with some firms lifting targets on AI related optimism while others cut estimates as they weigh GenAI driven deflation in traditional services. As you read on, you will see how these shifting price targets feed into the broader story and what to watch to stay on top of the...
